pages.aboutIntro: Established in 2011 in Jinan, Shandong, Huafeng focuses on packaging printing, paper product production and export-oriented food paper packaging.

pages.aboutBody: The company business scope includes packaging decoration printing, paper product production and sales, paper material sales and import/export of goods.
